text:
Deodorosaurus (デオドロザウルス, Deodorozaurusu) was a creature whose fecalmatter was up for auction in the Southernpiece Auction. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Plot

Greed Island arc

A fossilized dropping from a Deodorosaurus is auctioned off in the Southernpiece Auction.
